creator: ehaupt@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 242319
usbconfig dump_all_config_desc

When connecting a "Creative Katana V2X" soundbar via USB the device is detected as:

pcm9: <USB audio> on uaudio1

Switching hw.snd.default_unit to 9 I only get some garbled output (see attachment).

Additional attachments:
- usbconfig dump_all_config_desc
- usbconfig dump_all_desc
- output of /var/log/messages when attaching device
